text:
Created attachment 194798
Proposed patch (since 473514 revision)

Patch to update x11-themes/cursor-ardoise-theme port from 3.5 to 3.6 version.

Look following links for changes:
https://gitlab.com/obnosim/ardoise/tags/v3.6
https://gitlab.com/obnosim/ardoise/compare/v3.5...v3.6

- Change license to GPLv3 [1, 2]
